testcase.name: Complete Magic Link Authentication Flow › complete new user journey: email → magic link → onboarding → dashboard

failure.message: complete-auth-flow.spec.ts:17:3 complete new user journey: email → magic link → onboarding → dashboard

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › complete-auth-flow.spec.ts:17:3 › Complete Magic Link Authentication Flow › complete new user journey: email → magic link → onboarding → dashboard
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('input[type="email"], input[placeholder*="email"], input[name="email"]').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('input[type="email"], input[placeholder*="email"], input[name="email"]').first()
24 | // Step 2: Enter email and request magic link 25 | const emailInput = page.locator('input[type="email"], input[placeholder*="email"], input[name="email"]').first(); > 26 | await expect(emailInput).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 27 | await emailInput.fill(TEST_EMAIL); 28 | 29 | const submitBtn = page.locator('button[type="submit"], button:has-text("Continue")').first(); at C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\main jobhuntin\jobhuntin-e2e-tests\src\tests\complete-auth-flow.spec.ts:26:30

testcase.name: Complete Magic Link Authentication Flow › error handling: invalid email and network issues
Complete Magic Link Authentication Flow › rate limiting behavior
